name: Amaya 10000mAh Power Bank (APB-P119)
description: Compact and airline-approved Amaya power bank with a durable lithium polymer battery and anti-scratch textured finish.
warning: Does not feature advanced fast charging; suited for everyday reliable backup.

name: Amaya Traveler Link 10 10000mAh (APB-P110)
description: Highly convenient 10000mAh power bank featuring built-in charging cables, a built-in spotlight flashlight, and 12W max fast charging.
warning: Ensure built-in cables fit your specific device ports correctly.

name: Amaya 20000mAh Power Bank (APB-D27)
description: High-capacity outdoor-friendly power bank equipped with an integrated LED digital display screen and a bright outdoor camping lamp setup.
warning: Slightly heavier due to the large capacity and integrated camping light panel.

name: Amaya 20000mAh Power Bank (APB-P228L)
description: Heavy-duty 20000mAh battery unit featuring up to an incredible 148 hours of illumination capability, complete with a free 1-meter Type-C cable pack.
warning: Remember to ask the retail staff to supply your free 1M Type-C cable at pickup.

name: Amaya 10000mAh 22.5W Power Bank (APW-12)
description: Premium slick-finish 22.5W Power Delivery fast-charging power bank boasting a clear LED digital battery status display and integrated charging cables.

specs.compatibility: Fast Charging for iPhone and Android

warning: 22.5W fast charging requires a phone model compatible with fast power intake protocols.

name: Amaya Stretch Cable 10000mAh (APB-F131)
description: Elegant, pocket-sized 22.5W super fast charger featuring an innovative built-in telescopic stretch cable system and clear digital battery readout.
warning: Handle the telescopic tension mechanism with gentle care for sustained longevity.

name: Amaya 10000mAh 22.5W Power Bank (APB-FD50)
description: Sleek, high-tier vertical profile power bank carrying 22.5W PD fast charging, dual-direction bidirectional power output options, and an integrated carry loop strap.

specs.compatibility: High-end iPhones, Samsung, and Pixel Devices

name: Amaya PowerBox 400 40000mAh (APB-40)
description: Massive heavy-duty PowerBox station delivering a vast 40000mAh pool of energy, featuring 22.5W PD fast charging, an integrated handle, and an LED digital interface.
warning: Extremely bulky and heavy; intended primarily for power outages or remote travel.

name: Amaya PowerBox 60 60000mAh Super Fast Charger
description: The ultimate charging brick with a colossal 60000mAh reservoir capacity, heavy duty rugged frame, 22.5W super fast charging, built-in line clusters, and a powerful multi-LED array station lamp.

specs.ports: Built-in Cable Tree & Heavy Duty Output Hubs
specs.compatibility: All Smartphones, Tablets, Outdoor Camping Accessories
specs.safety: Thermal and Overcurrent Core Insulation Shield

warning: Very heavy unit; check airline regulations as it exceeds normal cabin-carry thresholds.

name: Amaya 20000mAh Power Bank (APB-P219)
description: Double capacity iteration of the APB-P119 line, holding 20000mAh of deep storage with a clean, textured anti-scratch body layout and flight compliance.

specs.safety: Standard High Density Core Security System

warning: Designed for long lasting power over speedy delivery.
